name: BANC OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
summary: General Banc of California, Inc., a Maryland corporation, was incorporated in March 2002 and serves as the holding company for its wholly owned subsidiary, Banc of California (the Bank), a California state-chartered bank and a member of the FRB. When we refer to the parent or the holding company, we are referring to Banc of California, Inc., the parent company, on a stand-alone basis. When we refer to we, us, our, or the Company, we are referring to Banc of California, Inc. and its consolidated ...
